Andromeda should be Q3 in the database
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
== Merged content ==
[[Category:Gaiad characters]]
[[sn:Andromeda]]{{Infobox deity|image=Andromeda.jpg}}
Andromeda is a black catgirl. When she reunites with the Milky way we will reach the [[Omega Point]]

Just like in Greek mythology she is black. She is not a black cat, she is a black catgirl. Dark skinned like Great Jahy-sama

She represents the knowledge that is lost by ignoring marginalized groups such as black women

[[Esther]] is the "Alpha" in the relationship and Andromeda is the "Omega".
[[sn:Andromeda]][[sn:Andromeda]][[sn:Andromeda]]
[[Category:First 250 notes]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
